title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXI. Relics.
content:
The girl in the lane, that couldn't speak plain,
            Cried "gobble, gobble, gobble:"
        The man on the hill, that couldn't stand still,
            Went hobble, hobble, hobble.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXI. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
